questionHtml: Sketch the graph of y = p ( t ) for 0 ≤ t ≤ 0.02 , showing clearly the coordinates of the first maximum and the first minimum.
markschemeHtml:
correct shape over correct domain with correct endpoints       A1
first maximum at (0.0035, 4.76)       A1
first minimum at (0.0085, −1.24)       A1

[3 marks]

meta.title: Sketch the graph of y = p ( t ) for 0 ≤ t ≤ 0.02 , showing clearly the coordinates of the first maximum and the first minimum.
